target.title: ci: add process exec CodeQL security shard
target.body:
## Summary
- add a `process-exec-boundary` CodeQL high-security shard for local shell, subprocess helpers, subprocess-owning bundled plugin runtimes, and workflow script glue
- wire the new shard into the existing `CodeQL` security matrix and PR/push path filters
- document the new security category and expanded trigger scope in CI docs

## Why
- supersedes #74437, which added a stale manual-only `local-shell` shard
- current main already covers part of `src/process/**`, but leaves TUI local shell, Plugin SDK/Memory host spawn helpers, key bundled plugin subprocess runtimes, and workflow Node scripts outside the JavaScript/TypeScript security baseline
- keeps the current high/critical `security-severity` CodeQL filter contract instead of adding a broader manual profile

## Verification
- `git diff --check`
- `pnpm docs:list`
- `node scripts/check-workflows.mjs`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` -> clean, no accepted/actionable findings
target.author: hxy91819
